title: downstream.json
description: Configuration for nanvix-zutil downstream consumer testing.

$schema.description: Path to this schema file for editor validation.

defaults.description: Default values applied to all consumers unless overridden.

checkout_strategy.description: Default checkout strategy for consumer repos.

repos_root.description: Root directory for consumer repo checkouts.

win_repos_root.description: Windows-side repos root for native NTFS perf. Null means auto-detect from %USERPROFILE%.

branch_pattern.description: Glob pattern for resolving consumer branch names.

consumers.description: List of downstream consumer repositories to test.

path.description: Absolute path override — skips repos_root resolution.

branch.description: Per-repo branch override — skips branch_pattern resolution.
